emails.subject: NatsourceDirect Trading Contract
emails.body: Please call Trent Claughton and find out how we get access to the site (guest ids) and if we need to download any software, etc. to run the system. His number is 403 215-5575 Thanks Sheri Forwarded by Sheri Thomas/HOU/ECT on 02/20/2001 09:51 AM Mark Greenberg@ENRON 02/12/2001 04:46 PM

emails.subject: Re: NatsourceDirect Trading Contract
emails.body: Re: NatsourceDirect Trading Contract Sheri, Trent returned my call today and he is going to email the software needed to download to run the system. We have to call them for every guest id issued. The products currently offered are emissions and coal. Thanks, Stephanie From: Sheri Thomas 02/20/2001 09:53 AM
